positive: A maximalist, vibrant watercolor abstract floral crown intertwined with jungle foliage and fantastical bioluminescent insects. The composition should be a circular, repeating pattern, featuring highly detailed elements like stylized parrots, oversized tropical leaves, and glowing fireflies. Style: Mediterranean art deco meets Japanese woodblock print. Color Palette: Deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, ruby reds, and striking turquoise accents against a creamy off-white background. Composition: Perfect circular repeat suitable for all-over apparel print. Lighting: Bright, high-key diffused lighting to maximize color saturation and print clarity. Focus on clean silhouettes and bold contrast. Central subject is the repeating, lush floral crown pattern.
